name: maestro-economics
description: Public Maestro Economics skill routing for CLI-first research-compute diagnosis.

interface.shortDescription: CLI-first economics compute diagnosis for agents
interface.longDescription: Install this plugin when the agent needs public Maestro Economics workflow routing and CLI-first RA Compute diagnosis. It teaches agents to use mecon status/watch/profile/debug, interpret timed_out and low GPU utilization correctly, and avoid guessing from stale progress labels. Runtime, CLI, worker, and deployment code are private and are not distributed in this plugin.
